description: Execution environment for hot-loop benchmarks (README overview plot, scaling_results.json, tpch_sf1_results.json)

engines_single_thread.bare_rust: no OpenMP; median of timed loop iterations (projected columns)
engines_single_thread.verified_rust: no OpenMP; median of timed RunQuery iterations; Dafny→Rust + postprocessor

metric_definition: Microseconds for the median timed query-loop execution after warm-up; table/column load is outside the timer.
